## Summary

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] Desktop tested when desktop networking changed
- [ ] Mobile tested when shared UI/networking changed

## Security and compatibility

- [ ] Manual proxy mode still has no direct fallback
- [ ] Node.js modules are not executed on mobile
- [ ] Secret values are not stored in `data.json`
